titleStmt.title: SII 36.141: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 141. (A.R. No. 141 of 1910.) VEḶḶALŪR, COIMBATORE TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the Varadarāja Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: (Chitrabhānu, Vaikāsi, 15, śu., 5, Friday, Pūsam = A.D. 1342, May 10, Friday.)

Assignment of 20 mā of land as kuḍinīṅgāt-tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam to the temple of Tiruvulagaḷanda Perumāḷ in the village. The assembly of Veḷḷalūr alias Sōmīsaradēvich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Pērūr-nāḍu agreed to pay the tax dues fixed on permanent basis (vāḍākkaḍamai) for the whole year amounting to forty paṇams and four hundred kalams of paddy at the gate of tirumaḍaippaḷḷi. Mentions the grain measure tiruvāṉaik-kāl.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vīravallāḷatevar prathivirājyam paṇṇi Aru
ḷā niṉṟa citrabhān samvatsarattu vaikāci mātam [ 10 5 ṉāḷ pūrva] pakṣa(t)ttu pa
ñcamiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum pūcamum peṟṟa nāḷ perūr nāṭṭu veḷḷalūṟāṉa co
mīsaradevi ccaturvveti maṅkalattu sabhaiyom nāyaṉār tiruvulakaḷanta perumāḷukku
ivvūrāṇaipāriyil tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāṉa vaṭakkil maṉṉaṟaiyil Ellai varampuk
ku kīḻpāṟ kellai kīḻaikkāṭṭukku meṟkum teṉpāṟ kellai Uttamaṉ vatikku vaṭa
kkum melpārk kellai Ērikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai ciṅkaṇanallūr vaḻikkut teṟ
kum Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa rūpāySymbol for ‘nilam’ 2 10 mā Iṉṉila Irupatu māvum kuṭinīṅkāt tiruviṭai
yāṭṭamāka tām veṇṭum payiṟ ceytu koṇṭu nāyiṉār śrīpaṇṭārattukku [ ce
vvāramum] Āṇṭoṉṟukku māttāl paṇam Iraṇṭum nellu Irupatiṉ kalamumāka
4 10 nellu 4 100 kalam Ippaṇam nāṟpatum nellu nānūṟṟuk kalamum Āṇṭutoṟum vāṭākaṭa
maiyāka tirumaṭaippaḷḷi vācalile tiruvāṉakkālāle Aḷantu kuṭukka kaṭavomākavu
m Ippaṭi cantrātittavarai naṭakka cempilum kallilum veṭṭik kuṭuttom sabheyom .
Digital edition of SII 36.141 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
